name: Onfolio Holdings, Inc
summary: PART I . Company Overview Onfolio Holdings Inc. was incorporated on July 20, 2020 under the laws of Delaware to acquire and develop high-growth and profitable online businesses. Unless the context otherwise requires, all references to our Company, we, our or us and other similar terms means Onfolio Holdings Inc., a Delaware corporation, and our wholly owned subsidiaries.
